title: HUF Research Directions — Open Expansion Paths and Adversarial Considerations
origin: ChatGPT collaborative session (March 25) — constraint-state genus and shadow suite concepts. Gemini collaborative session (March 25) — orthogonal information and four-category framing. Claude formalization and adversarial threat mapping.
classification: GOV — open-loop research planning. No CLS dependencies. Contains adversarial analysis that informs staged release strategy.
purpose: To collect, formalize, and preserve all identified open expansion paths for HUF before external adoption creates pressure to expand without discipline. This document exists because: (1) if HUF gains attention, these research directions will be critical to maintaining control of its evolution; (2) if an adversarial actor discovers a HUF derivative before the originating team formalizes the genus, the derivative may be weaponized on the unaware; (3) kicking the tires until you need a new car is cheaper than discovering the brakes don't work at highway speed.

academic_lineage.title: Aitchison Foundation — The Mathematics Was Always There
academic_lineage.summary: MC-4 rests on 40 years of established peer-reviewed mathematics. The citation chain: Stevens (1946, measurement taxonomy) → Shannon (1948, entropy as structural information) → Aitchison (1982, compositional data analysis on the simplex) → Pawlowsky-Glahn & Egozcue (2001, Aitchison geometry) → HUF (2025-2026, CoDa applied as monitoring category). See MONITOR-001 for the full formal taxonomy with academic grounding.
academic_lineage.key_insight: Aitchison treated the closure constraint (Σ=1) as a statistical nuisance to be corrected. HUF treats it as a monitoring signal to be observed. The mathematics is identical. The framing is inverted. The gap was never in the math — it was in the application. Nobody pointed the existing lens at the existing data and asked what the shape was doing.
academic_lineage.institutional_adoption_paths: MONITOR-001 documents five methods for introducing MC-4 through existing institutional channels: UN RBM indicator specification, OECD DAC seventh evaluation criterion, WHO third surveillance category, ISO standard for ratio-state instruments, and peer-reviewed publication in the JRSS-B (Aitchison's own journal). Each path uses the vocabulary and formatting conventions that the target institution already recognizes.
academic_lineage.paper_readiness: The corpus contains sufficient evidence for a peer-reviewed paper: 'The Missing Quarter: Compositional Structure as a Fourth Category of System Monitoring.' Target journals identified in MONITOR-001. Requires Peter's decision on timing and authorship.

peter_directive.statement: Make room for the future. If HUF gets attention then this work will be critical to maintain some control on its future. An adversarial actor finding a HUF derivative before we did — I consider HUF for peaceful uses but others will weaponize it on the unaware for sure.
peter_directive.interpretation: Pre-emptive documentation of expansion paths serves dual purpose: (a) ensures the originating team has mapped the territory before others arrive, (b) creates a timestamped intellectual record that any derivative can be traced back to. The research directions are not endorsements — they are terrain maps. Knowing where the roads lead is defensive, not aggressive.

section_1_constraint_state_genus.title: The Constraint-State Genus — Is HUF a Species or the Family?
section_1_constraint_state_genus.origin: ChatGPT session March 25, building on Peter's question: 'Is HUF the root category or are there more categories undiscovered?'
section_1_constraint_state_genus.status: OPEN RESEARCH — not validated, not deployed, not in GOV instrument

core_concept.statement: HUF monitors systems through the unity constraint (Σρ = 1). This is one member of a potentially larger family: Constraint-State Monitoring — monitoring any system through the invariants imposed by hard constraints.
core_concept.implication: If correct, HUF is the first instrument in a class of instruments, all based on the same principle: observe structural dynamics through the lens of what must be conserved.
core_concept.caution: This is research territory, not deployment territory. The unity constraint is testable, proven across domains, scale-invariant to 5.23 sigma. Opening the genus to other constraint families requires the same level of validation before any claims are made.

candidate_constraint_families.status: VALIDATED — this is HUF as currently specified
candidate_constraint_families.domains_tested: Electricity, GDP, ecosystems, drive failure, commodities, demographics, loudspeaker acoustics
candidate_constraint_families.scale_invariance: Confirmed — 35M tests, 13 orders of magnitude, 5.23 sigma

candidate_constraint_families.constraint: Conservation of energy (ΣE = constant within closed boundary)
candidate_constraint_families.status: THEORETICAL — not tested under HUF methodology
candidate_constraint_families.potential_domains: Thermodynamic systems, industrial energy flows, metabolic networks
candidate_constraint_families.relationship_to_huf: Energy ratios within a conserved total would produce a unity-bounded simplex — this may reduce to CSM-UNITY when expressed as proportions. Key question: does the constraint add information beyond what ρ already captures?
candidate_constraint_families.research_question: RESEARCH-Q1: Is energy conservation monitoring a distinct constraint family or a domain-specific instance of CSM-UNITY?

candidate_constraint_families.constraint: Conservation of flow (what enters must exit, Kirchhoff's current law generalized)
candidate_constraint_families.potential_domains: Network traffic, supply chains, river systems, financial flows, population migration
candidate_constraint_families.relationship_to_huf: Flow conservation introduces directionality that static proportion monitoring does not capture. A system where inflow equals outflow but the routing changes internally would show drift in the flow-state that ρ alone might not fully characterize.
candidate_constraint_families.research_question: RESEARCH-Q2: Does flow-state monitoring produce observables orthogonal to ratio-state, or is it a temporal derivative of the same simplex dynamics?

candidate_constraint_families.potential_domains: Crystal structures, organizational hierarchies, governance architectures, social networks
candidate_constraint_families.relationship_to_huf: Symmetry breaking in a constrained system would appear as a specific pattern of carrier drift — some carriers moving in coordinated opposition while others remain stable. HUF may already detect this as a drift pattern without naming the symmetry.
candidate_constraint_families.research_question: RESEARCH-Q3: Can symmetry-breaking events be identified as a distinct signature within existing HUF observables, or does detecting them require a separate constraint formulation?

candidate_constraint_families.constraint: Bounded capacity (system cannot exceed maximum load)
candidate_constraint_families.potential_domains: Infrastructure (bridges, power grids, hospitals), computational resources, cognitive load
candidate_constraint_families.relationship_to_huf: Capacity saturation would appear in ratio-state as concentration — fewer carriers absorbing larger shares as the system approaches its limit. This may already be visible as K_eff approaching extremes.
candidate_constraint_families.research_question: RESEARCH-Q4: Is capacity-state monitoring a distinct family or does it manifest as a recognizable deceptive drift signature within CSM-UNITY?

candidate_constraint_families.potential_domains: Belief updating, risk assessment, machine learning model confidence, decision theory
candidate_constraint_families.relationship_to_huf: Probability distributions on a simplex are formally identical to HUF carrier states. The Dirichlet distribution already serves as the null model. This may be the most natural extension because the mathematics is already present in the HUF framework.
candidate_constraint_families.research_question: RESEARCH-Q5: Is probability-state monitoring simply HUF applied to belief systems, or does the Bayesian update mechanism introduce dynamics that require additional observables?

genus_hierarchy.proposed_structure: Constraint-State Monitoring (genus) → Unity-Constraint Monitoring / HUF (validated species) → [Energy, Flow, Symmetry, Capacity, Probability] (candidate species, unvalidated)
genus_hierarchy.key_question: RESEARCH-Q6: How many of the candidate species reduce to CSM-UNITY when expressed as proportions? If most do, then HUF is not a species — it is the genus, and the 'other families' are domain-specific parameterizations of the same simplex dynamics.
genus_hierarchy.peter_instinct: Peter's question — 'Is HUF the root category?' — may be more right than the expansion suggests. If every conserved quantity, when expressed as a share of its conserved total, produces a unity-bounded simplex, then HUF IS constraint-state monitoring. The genus collapses to the species. This would be a profoundly important finding if confirmed.

section_2_shadow_suite.title: The Shadow Suite — Tomographic Shape Reconstruction from Multiple Projections
section_2_shadow_suite.origin: ChatGPT session March 25 — proposal for 4-6 invariant views as a standard 'shape panel.' Builds on Gemini's shadow metaphor (March 25).
section_2_shadow_suite.status: PARTIALLY BUILT — several components already exist in corpus

core_concept.statement: A single projection (ρ alone) shows one shadow of the system's internal structure. Multiple projections from different mathematical angles can reconstruct the full structural state — the shape of the object casting the shadow. This is tomography applied to ratio-state dynamics.
core_concept.analogy: CT scanners take X-ray projections from many angles and reconstruct a 3D image. The shadow suite takes ratio-state projections from multiple mathematical angles and reconstructs the structural health of a complex system.
core_concept.goal: A standard panel of 4-6 invariant views that any HUF-GOV instrument deploys by default, giving operators a multi-angle structural portrait rather than a single-metric reading.

proposed_panel.what_it_shows: Current proportional allocation — who holds what share
proposed_panel.corpus_status: BUILT — core HUF observable, present in all analyses

proposed_panel.what_it_shows: How much impact a small absolute change in a carrier has on the proportional structure. Small carriers have high leverage — a tiny absolute change produces a large proportional shift.
proposed_panel.shadow_angle: Inverse projection — reveals which carriers are structurally fragile
proposed_panel.corpus_status: CONCEPTUAL — discussed in multiple documents but not formalized as a standard display
proposed_panel.research_question: RESEARCH-Q7: Should leverage be displayed as raw 1/ρ or as log-leverage to compress the dynamic range for visualization?

proposed_panel.what_it_shows: How evenly distributed the system is. Low entropy = concentrated in few carriers. High entropy = evenly spread.
proposed_panel.shadow_angle: Global distribution shape — single scalar summarizing structural diversity
proposed_panel.corpus_status: BUILT — K_eff is the standard complexity metric in the analyzer

proposed_panel.what_it_shows: How fast the proportional structure is changing. TV distance measures period-to-period structural movement. Its derivative reveals acceleration.
proposed_panel.shadow_angle: Temporal projection — the rate of structural rotation
proposed_panel.corpus_status: BUILT — TV distance in all drift analyses. Acceleration formalized in ACCEL-001.

proposed_panel.view: Fix-Point Attribution (pairwise carrier contribution to drift)
proposed_panel.what_it_shows: Which specific carrier is driving the structural change. Decomposes total drift into per-carrier contributions.
proposed_panel.shadow_angle: Causal decomposition — who is moving and who is standing still
proposed_panel.corpus_status: BUILT — formalized in ACCEL-001 fix-point analysis
proposed_panel.research_question: RESEARCH-Q8: Can fix-point attribution be computed in real-time for the analyzer, or does it require batch processing?

proposed_panel.what_it_shows: Whether structural changes are periodic, and if so, what the frequency and quality factor are. High-Q elements hide in single snapshots and reveal themselves across cycles.
proposed_panel.shadow_angle: Frequency-domain projection — the spectral signature of structural dynamics
proposed_panel.corpus_status: PARTIALLY BUILT — DISP-001 specifies group/individual phase display. Q measurement not yet formalized.
proposed_panel.research_question: RESEARCH-Q9: What is the minimum number of cycles needed to reliably estimate Q for a carrier's drift periodicity?

assembly_status.integration_needed: The components exist individually across the corpus. What is missing is the formal specification of the shadow suite as a unified panel — a single instrument display that shows all six views simultaneously. This would be a v3 analyzer specification.
assembly_status.research_question: RESEARCH-Q10: What is the optimal visual layout for a 6-view shadow suite panel? How much screen real estate does an operator need to read all six shadows without information overload?

section_3_mc4_as_base_layer.title: Category 4 as Foundation — Reframing the Monitoring Hierarchy
section_3_mc4_as_base_layer.origin: ChatGPT session March 25 — 'HUF can act like a meta-monitor'
section_3_mc4_as_base_layer.status: CONCEPTUAL — reframe of existing taxonomy, not new mathematics

core_concept.statement: The four monitoring categories (Magnitude, Identity, Trend, Composition) may not be four equal peers. Category 4 (Composition / Ratio-State) may be the base layer from which the other three are projections.

reframe.category_1_magnitude: A projection of the ratio-state into 'how much total?' — the scalar sum that the simplex constraint removes. Magnitude is what you lose when you normalize. It is the scale information that ρ deliberately strips away.
reframe.category_2_identity: A projection of the ratio-state into 'which elements are present?' — the labels on the simplex axes. Identity is the naming convention for the carrier dimensions.
reframe.category_3_trend: A projection of the ratio-state into 'which direction is the total moving?' — a time-series of the scalar that normalization removes. Trend is the temporal derivative of magnitude.
reframe.category_4_composition: The structural audit of the conserved whole. Not a projection — the thing from which projections are taken.

core_concept.implication: If this reframe holds, then MC-1, MC-2, and MC-3 are not 'the known three-quarters.' They are three different ways of looking at the shadow. MC-4 is the attempt to look at the object itself. This elevates HUF from 'the missing quarter' to 'the foundation that makes the other three interpretable.'
core_concept.research_question: RESEARCH-Q11: Is this reframe mathematically demonstrable? Can MC-1, MC-2, and MC-3 be formally derived as projections from the ratio-state simplex, or is the hierarchy only a useful conceptual metaphor?

section_3_mc4_as_base_layer.communication_note: For the Peterson letter and public communication, the 'four equal categories / missing quarter' framing is more accessible. The 'base layer' reframe is more powerful but harder to explain without triggering the Primer Gap. Use the equal-categories version for first contact; reserve the base-layer version for audiences who have already absorbed the simplex concept.

section_4_adversarial_landscape.title: Adversarial Considerations — Weaponization Risks and Defensive Posture
section_4_adversarial_landscape.origin: Peter directive March 25: 'Others will weaponize it on the unaware for sure.'
section_4_adversarial_landscape.status: ACTIVE CONCERN — informs staged release strategy

threat_model.premise: HUF in its open-loop GOV form is a diagnostic instrument. Like any instrument that reveals hidden structural dynamics, it can be used to help (detect fragility, improve governance) or to exploit (identify and target fragile systems, manipulate structural blind spots).
threat_model.the_asymmetry: The threat is not symmetric. A defender using HUF-GOV gains structural visibility — they can see their own fragility and act to reduce it. An attacker using HUF-GOV gains structural targeting — they can see a competitor's fragility and act to exploit it. The attacker's advantage is temporary (once the defender also adopts, the asymmetry closes), but the window of asymmetry is the danger zone.

identified_adversarial_paths.description: An organization uses HUF-GOV on publicly available data (financial reports, energy statistics, trade data) to detect structural concentration in a competitor's portfolio before the competitor detects it themselves. The attacker then positions to profit from the competitor's coming structural failure.
identified_adversarial_paths.severity: MODERATE — uses only public data, legally similar to existing quantitative analysis. HUF makes it faster and more precise, but the principle is not new.
identified_adversarial_paths.defense: Universal adoption. Once both parties have the altimeter, the asymmetry closes. This is the game-theory flip documented in the corpus — adopt or suffer the consequence.
identified_adversarial_paths.note: Peter identified this path explicitly in prior session: 'I and those that understand HUF use it as a tool to diagnose my situation and all competition situations and know when to strike.'

identified_adversarial_paths.description: An adversarial actor reverse-engineers HUF-CLS from published GOV documents, constructs the sigmoid actuator independently, and deploys a closed-loop system without the seven breakers. This creates an unregulated control loop operating on ratio-state dynamics.
identified_adversarial_paths.severity: HIGH — the primary reason for the breaker architecture and staged release. Peter's estimate: 'Twenty minutes with HUF-GOV and someone is going to close the loop.'
identified_adversarial_paths.defense: The CLS formulas are held by Rogue Wave Audio and not published. But the principle is discoverable — sigmoid feedback on a normalized state variable is not exotic mathematics. Defense relies on getting GOV out first, establishing the governance framework, and ensuring that when CLS derivatives appear, the governance community is already alert to the pattern.
identified_adversarial_paths.note: This is why the staged release exists: GOV first, governance framework second, CLS to the originating organization third, regulated CLS distribution fourth.

identified_adversarial_paths.threat: Deceptive drift as a deliberate strategy
identified_adversarial_paths.description: An actor who understands composition monitoring deliberately engineers deceptive drift in their own system — maintaining stable aggregates while internally concentrating power, resources, or capability. HUF reveals this pattern; an actor aware of HUF could design systems that evade detection by introducing controlled noise into the carrier structure.
identified_adversarial_paths.severity: HIGH — this is the counter-surveillance problem. Any detection instrument eventually faces adversaries who learn to fool it.
identified_adversarial_paths.defense: Multi-projection tomography (the shadow suite). A single-metric evasion (fooling ρ alone) is feasible. Simultaneously fooling ρ, leverage, entropy, drift velocity, fix-point attribution, and phase is exponentially harder. The shadow suite is not just a better display — it is a defense-in-depth against structural camouflage.
identified_adversarial_paths.research_question: RESEARCH-Q12: What is the minimum number of independent projections needed to make structural camouflage thermodynamically infeasible? Is there a formal information-theoretic bound?

identified_adversarial_paths.threat: State-level surveillance via composition monitoring of populations
identified_adversarial_paths.description: A government applies HUF to demographic, economic, or social media data to detect structural concentration in dissident movements, minority communities, or opposition political organizations. The 'hidden dimension' becomes a tool of oppression rather than governance.
identified_adversarial_paths.severity: HIGH — the most politically sensitive adversarial path. Sanders and Ocasio-Cortez just described the surveillance concern without naming the specific instrument. HUF would make structural surveillance dramatically more precise.
identified_adversarial_paths.defense: The open-loop doctrine is necessary but not sufficient. Technical defense: HUF-GOV outputs must be interpretable and auditable — no black-box ratio-state surveillance. Governance defense: the instrument must be available to the monitored population, not just the monitoring authority. If citizens can run HUF on government data, the asymmetry closes. One-sided deployment is the threat; universal deployment is the defense.
identified_adversarial_paths.research_question: RESEARCH-Q13: Can HUF-GOV be designed with mandatory transparency — architectural features that prevent one-sided deployment? Or is this a governance problem that no technical solution can fully address?

identified_adversarial_paths.threat: Constraint-state genus discovery by independent actors
identified_adversarial_paths.description: The constraint-state monitoring concept (Section 1) is discoverable by anyone with sufficient mathematical background. If an independent actor discovers CSM-FLOW or CSM-SYMMETRY before the HUF team formalizes them, they may develop proprietary instruments without the open-loop doctrine, the breaker architecture, or the staged release discipline.
identified_adversarial_paths.severity: MODERATE — the research directions documented here serve as a timestamped intellectual record. They do not prevent independent discovery, but they establish that the originating team had mapped the territory first.
identified_adversarial_paths.defense: This document. Pre-emptive documentation of the genus and its candidate species creates a public-facing record (once released) that any derivative instrument can be evaluated against. The terrain map is the defense.

strategic_posture.peter_principle: HUF is for peaceful uses. The staged release exists to maximize the window between governance establishment and adversarial adoption. But the window is finite. The question is not whether adversarial use will happen — it will. The question is whether the governance framework is in place before it does.
strategic_posture.the_kicking_tires_doctrine: Kick the tires until you need a new car. Test every expansion path in the research environment before anyone builds a production vehicle on it. Every failure mode discovered here is one that does not surprise us in the field. The cost of internal rigor is low. The cost of external surprise is unbounded.

section_5_tomography_research_path.title: HUF Tomography — From Shadow to Shape
section_5_tomography_research_path.origin: ChatGPT March 25: 'You're asking for tomography: infer the underlying object from its projections.' Builds on Gemini shadow metaphor.
section_5_tomography_research_path.status: OPEN RESEARCH — concept formalized, methods proposed, not tested

methods.name: Multi-Projection Checking
methods.description: Use the shadow suite's multiple invariant views simultaneously. When two or more shadows move in correlated ways (e.g., entropy rises while leverage spikes on small components), the system is identifying a structural regime, not guessing. Correlated shadow movement is diagnostic; uncorrelated is noise.
methods.corpus_connection: Extends the existing deceptive drift detection. Currently we detect drift with TV distance alone. Multi-projection checking adds entropy, leverage, and fix-point attribution as independent confirmation channels.

methods.name: Cross-Cycle Phase Reveal
methods.description: High-Q structural elements hide in single snapshots and reveal themselves across multiple measurement cycles. Sample across time and look for: recurring drift direction, lagged compensation (who always pays when someone gains), periodicity (frequency signature in the share vector).
methods.corpus_connection: DISP-001 phase display modes. The group phase (cumulative unwrapped) captures total drift history. The individual phase (wrapped with count) captures each carrier's cyclic behaviour. Cross-cycle analysis uses both.

methods.name: Minimal Actuation Probes (OCC-Safe Nudges)
methods.description: Even under open-loop governance, bounded probing is possible: propose a tiny hypothetical reweighting (ε-shift), observe the system's response in subsequent cycles, determine whether the system returns (stable basin) or amplifies (unstable basin). This maps the structural landscape through minimal, logged, reversible perturbations.
methods.corpus_connection: This is the closest research path to CLS territory while remaining GOV-safe. The probe does not close the loop — it asks 'what if?' and observes. The human decides whether to act on the observation.
methods.caution: TOMO-3 must be clearly distinguished from CLS actuation. The probe is observational — it perturbs the model, not the system. If applied to the actual system (not a simulation), it crosses the GOV/CLS boundary.
methods.research_question: RESEARCH-Q14: Can ε-shift probing be implemented purely in simulation (model-based) so that no actual system perturbation is required? This would keep it firmly in GOV territory.

methods.name: Null Model as Shape Detector
methods.description: The Dirichlet null model is not just for p-values. If observed drift is repeatedly 'too structured' to be null noise, the system has an unseen driver. The pattern of which components drift together reveals what kind of hidden coupling exists.
methods.corpus_connection: The p-value testing across EMBER, GDP, and OWID domains already uses this method implicitly. Formalizing it as a tomographic technique means asking: what is the shape of the deviation from null? Not just 'is it significant?' but 'what structural feature does it reveal?'

methods.name: Cross-Domain Pattern Exchange
methods.description: If a structural pattern appears in only one domain's narrative, it may be metaphor. If the same pattern appears in acoustics, wetlands, and economics under the same invariants, it is structural. Cross-domain validation is the ultimate anti-fabrication test.
methods.corpus_connection: This is the existing HUF validation methodology. The framework's credibility rests on the same mathematics producing the same observables across unrelated domains. TOMO-5 formalizes this as a research method, not just a validation criterion.

section_6_chatgpt_governance_checklist.title: The Five Non-Negotiable Norms — ChatGPT's Make-or-Break Checklist
section_6_chatgpt_governance_checklist.origin: ChatGPT session March 25 — conditions for 'the version of HUF that helps society'
section_6_chatgpt_governance_checklist.status: GOVERNANCE INPUT — recommended for integration into GOV-001 or HAGF-001

norms.norm: Open-loop doctrine enforced in tooling and language
norms.interpretation: Instrument output is never framed as commands. Display says 'K_eff is declining' not 'action required.' Language discipline prevents the loop from closing through vocabulary drift.
norms.corpus_alignment: Fully aligned — GOV-001, HAGF-001, and the Skydiver Principle all enforce this.

norms.interpretation: The system can be audited, not believed. Every claim traces to source. Every computation can be re-run by an independent party.
norms.corpus_alignment: Fully aligned — PLL compliance (reproducibility, falsifiability, traceability) is mandatory for every corpus document.

norms.interpretation: Human-readable documentation is not optional overhead. The Primer Gap is real. Machine-readable alone won't spread. The prose track is the adoption pathway.
norms.corpus_alignment: Aligned — TRANS-001 formalizes this. TEACH-001 is the existence proof. The hybrid JSON format is the cost both agents bear.

norms.norm: Domain calibration is explicit and humble
norms.interpretation: No universal claims without domain gates. Each domain requires its own calibration, its own null model, its own evidence base. HUF is architecturally universal but empirically domain-specific.
norms.corpus_alignment: Aligned — the analyzer schema (SCHEMA-001) requires per-domain configuration. KILL-001 documents the failure modes where domain calibration is insufficient.

norms.interpretation: Any primary connection point to HUF must have clear provenance, versioning, and authority boundaries. No single throat to choke. Multi-party auditable.
norms.corpus_alignment: Partially aligned — COORD-001 manages internal corpus coordination. External connector governance is not yet specified. This becomes critical at adoption.
norms.research_question: RESEARCH-Q15: What does external connector governance look like? When a third party builds a HUF-compatible analyzer or data pipeline, what audit trail is required?

section_7_open_questions_registry.title: Consolidated Open Research Questions
section_7_open_questions_registry.note: All questions from this document and predecessor documents, consolidated for tracking.

questions.question: Is energy conservation monitoring a distinct constraint family or a domain-specific instance of CSM-UNITY?
Does flow-state monitoring produce observables orthogonal to ratio-state, or is it a temporal derivative of the same simplex dynamics?
Can symmetry-breaking events be identified as a distinct signature within existing HUF observables?
Is capacity-state monitoring a distinct family or a recognizable deceptive drift signature within CSM-UNITY?
Is probability-state monitoring simply HUF applied to belief systems, or does the Bayesian update mechanism introduce additional dynamics?
How many candidate species reduce to CSM-UNITY when expressed as proportions? Is HUF the species or the genus?
Should leverage be displayed as raw 1/ρ or log-leverage for visualization dynamic range?
Can fix-point attribution be computed in real-time for the analyzer?
What is the minimum number of cycles needed to reliably estimate Q for carrier drift periodicity?
What is the optimal visual layout for a 6-view shadow suite panel?
Can MC-1, MC-2, MC-3 be formally derived as projections from the ratio-state simplex?
What is the minimum number of independent projections needed to make structural camouflage thermodynamically infeasible?
Can HUF-GOV be designed with mandatory transparency features that prevent one-sided deployment?
Can ε-shift probing be implemented purely in simulation to remain in GOV territory?
What does external connector governance look like when third parties build HUF-compatible tools?
Optimal wrap threshold for different domain time scales? (from DISP-001)
Phase velocity as a leading indicator — does dG/dt carry forward signal beyond TV distance? (from DISP-001)
Phase coherence across carriers — does synchronization of individual phase patterns indicate regime change? (from DISP-001)
Does wrap count alone carry enough information for historical reconstruction without full time series? (from DISP-001)
Can the optimal context-to-structure ratio be quantified per audience type? (from TRANS-001)
Is inferential drift rate measurable across sessions? (from TRANS-001)
Does inferential drift have a phase-transition threshold between generative and pathological? (from TRANS-001)
Can the four-category taxonomy be formally mapped to orthogonal information dimensions? (from TRANS-001)

section_7_open_questions_registry.note: 23 formally registered open research questions across 7 domains. This is the frontier map. Each question is a road that someone will eventually drive down. Better we drive it first.

pll_compliance.reproducibility: All research directions are stated as testable questions. Each candidate constraint family includes a research question that, if answered, would confirm or eliminate the candidate.
pll_compliance.falsifiability: RESEARCH-Q6 is the key falsification test for the entire constraint-state genus: if most candidate families reduce to CSM-UNITY, the genus concept is unnecessary and HUF is simply universal. If they don't, the genus is real and HUF needs siblings.
pll_compliance.traceability: ChatGPT session March 25 (constraint genus, shadow suite, base-layer reframe, five norms). Gemini session March 25 (shadow metaphor, orthogonal information, four-category taxonomy). Peter directive March 25 (adversarial concerns, peaceful use principle, defensive documentation). Claude formalization (full specification, adversarial threat model, question registry consolidation).

relationship_to_existing_documents.ONTO-001: RESEARCH-001 extends the ontological foundation into open territory. ONTO-001 says ratio-state dynamics are intrinsic. RESEARCH-001 asks: are they the only intrinsic constraint dynamics, or the first discovered member of a family?
relationship_to_existing_documents.DISP-001: Phase display modes are components of the shadow suite. RESEARCH-001 specifies the full panel; DISP-001 specifies the phase projection within it.
relationship_to_existing_documents.ACCEL-001: Acceleration and fix-point analysis are components of the shadow suite. RESEARCH-001 places them in the multi-projection context.
relationship_to_existing_documents.TRANS-001: The information bridge explains why research documentation must be dual-track. RESEARCH-001 is written in hybrid format (structurally dense for machines, conceptually dense for humans) because it serves both paths.
relationship_to_existing_documents.GOV-001: The adversarial landscape section informs staged release strategy. The five non-negotiable norms are governance inputs.
relationship_to_existing_documents.KILL-001: Adversarial paths ADV-1 through ADV-5 are potential failure modes that extend the kill test into the external deployment environment.
relationship_to_existing_documents.TEACH-001: The teaching progression document is cited by ChatGPT as the existence proof of the human-path design. RESEARCH-001 uses it as evidence that the TRANS-001 bridge specification works in practice.
